missions.name: Relay TX-4 Cold Reboot
missions.description: Comms relay TX-4 dropped off the grid last orbit. Dock at the relay, EVA out, and cycle the cold-gas thruster array so ground stations can reacquire it.

missions.name: Hubble Optical Alignment
missions.description: Hubble's primary mirror actuator stack drifted out of spec after the last reboost. EVA to the observatory, lock the fine-guidance sensors, and walk the alignment back into tolerance.
